name: Devonshire Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons White Wine (or Sherry or Lemon Juice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a white sauce by melting butter in a saucepan over low heat. Add flour and stir until smooth.
2. Gradually add chicken broth and wine (or lemon juice) while continuing to whisk the mixture.
3. Remove from heat and gradually fold in cream and egg yolks, stirring constantly until combined.
4. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Place a slice of toasted bread on a serving plate.
6. Arrange thin slices of ham and chicken on top of the toast.
7. Pour the sauce over the ham and chicken.
8. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese evenly over the dish.
9. Broil under low heat for about 2-3 minutes, or until the Parmesan cheese melts.
10. Serve immediately.
Makes 4 open-faced sandwiches.
